product.name: RoadmapSmith
product.northStar: Make every software project ship with a living, evidence-backed roadmap — zero manual maintenance.
product.positioning: RoadmapSmith is a CLI tool and Claude skill that auto-generates, validates, and syncs ROADMAP.md files directly from repository evidence. Unlike static roadmap templates or project management tools, RoadmapSmith keeps the roadmap honest: tasks are only marked complete when code, tests, or artifacts back them up.
product.primaryUser: Solo developers and small teams using AI coding agents (Claude Code, Copilot, etc.).
product.targetOutcome: Developers run one command and get a production-grade, evidence-validated ROADMAP.md they are proud to publish — and it stays accurate as the project evolves.
antiGoals: Replace project management tools like Linear or Jira
Require a backend service or database
Generate roadmaps without real repository context
Act as a project planning tool that replaces human judgment
risks: Inference quality degrades on very large monorepos (scan cap at 120 files)
Professional profile sections may feel over-structured for small hobby projects
Task similarity matching may mis-merge tasks with overlapping language
Roadmap drift if users edit the managed block directly instead of using the CLI
successCriteria: compact mode generates idempotent output on all fixture projects
professional mode renders all 12 required sections without errors
checked task state survives regeneration across both profiles
RoadmapSmith's own ROADMAP.md is generated entirely by RoadmapSmith itself
npm test passes with no failures on all fixture languages

phases.title: Product Architecture
phases.objective: Establish the renderer architecture, model hierarchy, and config schema that power all future profiles.

steps.title: Renderer Architecture
steps.objective: Renderer architecture with compact and professional profiles dispatched via renderBody.

tasks.text: Preserve compact backward compatibility
Extract compact renderer to renderer/compact.js
Add renderer dispatcher (renderBody)

exitCriteria.text: Compact output remains byte-stable where expected

steps.title: Model Improvements
steps.objective: Add Phase→Step→Task hierarchy and task-level priority to the professional model.

tasks.text: Add phasesDetailed model field
Filter code vs doc TODOs in Known Limitations inference
Add task-level priority rendering with [P0]/[P1] labels

exitCriteria.text: A P0 task inside a P2 step renders with [P0] label in correct step position
Known Limitations no longer includes doc-only TODO mentions

phases.title: Validation Quality
phases.objective: Harden evidence-based validation and reduce false-positive task matching.

steps.title: Evidence Validation Hardening
steps.objective: Fix false-positive validation and improve evidence scoring reliability.

tasks.text: Fix false-positive task similarity matching on overlapping text
Add fixture for doc-only TODO filtering test
Improve evidence scoring for test file coverage

exitCriteria.text: All validation tests pass on node, python, go, rust fixtures
No false-positive task merges on similar-text tasks

phases.title: Showcase and Distribution
phases.objective: Make RoadmapSmith's own generated ROADMAP.md and README a compelling showcase.

steps.title: README and Docs
steps.objective: Update all user-facing docs to reflect Phase→Step→Task model and professional profile.

tasks.text: Add generated roadmap excerpt to README with Phase→Step→Task example
Update SKILL.md with Phase→Step→Task documentation
Add CHANGELOG.md entry for v0.4.0

exitCriteria.text: README shows real Phase→Step→Task output from ROADMAP.md

steps.title: npm Publishing
steps.objective: Publish RoadmapSmith to npm with stable semver aligned with git tags.

tasks.text: Publish stable semver to npm
Tag git release aligned with npm publish
Document npm global and npx install instructions

exitCriteria.text: npm publish succeeds and package is installable via npx roadmapsmith
